messages.content: 你可以帮我翻译一些中文句子变成英文吗？
当然可以！请告诉我你需要翻译的句子。
未来想做的
What I want to do in the future.
持续关注中ABX领域，但是想要尝试更轻松和幽默的表达方式
Continuously follow the ABX field, but looking to try a more relaxed and humorous way of expression.
我会持续关注中ABX领域，但是想要尝试更轻松和幽默的表达方式
I will continue to keep an eye on the ABX field, but I want to try a more relaxed and humorous way of expression.
事实上，我发现持续的以社会事件为灵感的批判创作让我有些感到抑郁，我想我在之后的一段时间还是会做A
Actually, I've found that continuously engaging in critical creative work inspired by social events has been a bit depressing for me. I think I'll focus more on doing A in the coming period of time.
关于我的创作习惯
Regarding my creative habits.
这也是为什么几乎我的每一个作品的表现形式和材料都不太一样。
That's also why almost every one of my works has a different form and material.
社会现象和事件，人类学
Social phenomena and events, anthropology.
我做了一个与特雷门琴原理一样的发声装置，在装置区域内随着我手的移动，装置会发出不同的声音。
I have created a sound device similar to the Theremin principle, where different sounds are produced as I move my hands within the device's range.
这个视频的声音并不是那么动听，因为它记录的事件也不是一件让人愉快的事情。
The sound in this video might not be as melodious because it captures an event that is not particularly pleasant.
